message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.4

103 commits since v0.2.3 including:
- Security: restrict cliCommand/baseUrl from repo configs
- Fixes: BOM stripping, standalone binary crash, CLI provider bugs,
  path normalization, MCP content wrapper
- Features: XDG Base Directory support, AWS Bedrock provider,
  CLI LLM backend (ollama etc.), sub-issue IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "cass-memory",
-  "version": "0.2.3",
+  "version": "0.2.4",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Universal memory system for AI coding agents - implements ACE framework",
   "author": "Jeffrey Emanuel",
